## Ready to Submit Now

### 1. awesome-ratatui -- `unifly` entry

**Repo:** https://github.com/natatui/awesome-ratatui
**Section:** ## 🏠 Apps -> networking/infra subsection (check alphabetization)
**Format:** `- [NAME](URL) - DESCRIPTION.`

```markdown
- [unifly](https://github.com/hyperb1iss/unifly) - CLI and TUI for managing Ubiquiti UniFi network controllers with an 8-screen dashboard, live traffic charts, and dual-API coverage.
```

**PR title:** `Add unifly`
**PR body:** `unifly` is a Ratatui-powered CLI + TUI for managing Ubiquiti UniFi network infrastructure. The TUI ships an 8-screen dashboard with area-fill traffic charts, zoomable topology, and live event streaming, all themed with opaline. Repo: https://github.com/hyperb1iss/unifly

### 2. awesome-ratatui -- `opaline` entry

**Repo:** https://github.com/natatui/awesome-ratatui
**Section:** ## 🎨 Libraries -> UI utilities subsection
**Format:** `- [NAME](URL) - DESCRIPTION.`

```markdown
- [opaline](https://github.com/hyperb1iss/opaline) - A luminous Ratatui theme system for polished dashboards, neon-accent tooling, and soft electric interfaces.
```

**PR title:** `Add opaline`
**PR body:** `opaline` is a theme toolkit for Ratatui projects with carefully balanced palettes, semantic color tokens, and print-friendly defaults for terminal screenshots.
